name: The Ultimate Chocolate Brownie Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Large, broken pecan or Walnut pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine Crisco, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed for 1 minute or until creamy.
3. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, beating on low speed for about 1 minute, or just until blended.
6. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips.
7. Drop dough by heaping spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons for each cookie) onto an ungreased baking sheet. Bake 6 to 9 cookies at a time, leaving about 3 inches between cookies for spreading.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes. The cookies will appear soft and moist when baked but firm up on cooling.
9. Cool the cookies for 2 minutes before removing them to a cooling rack. Makes about 3 dozen cookies. Smaller cookies can be made using 1 tablespoon of dough for each cookie; bake for 8-10 minutes. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
